TestCase.name: testEmptyIntersectThroughProject
TestCase.Resource: select * from (values (30, 3)) intersect select * from (values (10, 1), (30, 3)) as t (x, y) where x > 50 intersect select * from (values (30, 3))

LogicalIntersect(all=[false]) LogicalIntersect(all=[false]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 30, 3 }]]) LogicalProject(X=[$0], Y=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 50)]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 10, 1 }, { 30, 3 }]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 30, 3 }]])

TestCase.name: testEmptyMinusThroughProject
TestCase.Resource: select * from (values (30, 3)) as t (x, y) where x > 30 except select * from (values (20, 2)) except select * from (values (40, 4))

LogicalMinus(all=[false]) LogicalMinus(all=[false]) LogicalProject(X=[$0], Y=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 30)]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 30, 3 }]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 20, 2 }]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 40, 4 }]])

TestCase.name: testEmptyUnionThroughProject
TestCase.Resource: select * from ( select * from (values (10, 1), (30, 3)) as t (x, y) union all select * from (values (20, 2)) ) where x + y > 30

LogicalProject(X=[$0], Y=[$1]) LogicalFilter(condition=[>(+($0, $1), 30)]) LogicalUnion(all=[true]) LogicalProject(X=[$0], Y=[$1]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 10, 1 }, { 30, 3 }]]) LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1]) LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 20, 2 }]])
